# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Self-Hosted Runner Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - 'release/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

env:
  ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/build
  ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy
  MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE_KB: 100

jobs:
  validate-scripts:
    name: Validate Build and Deploy Scripts
    runs-on: self-hosted
    outputs:
      build_script_valid: ${{ steps.validate_build.outputs.valid }}
      deploy_script_valid: ${{ steps.validate_deploy.outputs.valid }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Validate build script exists and is safe
        id: validate_build
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="./scripts/build.sh"

          if [ ! -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script not found at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi

          FILE_SIZE_KB=$(du -k "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | cut -f1)
          if [ "$FILE_SIZE_KB" -gt "$MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE_KB" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script exceeds maximum allowed size of ${MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE_KB}KB"
            exit 1
          fi

          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            'curl.*|.*sh'
            'wget.*|.*sh'
            'eval\s'
            '\$\(.*curl'
            '\$\(.*wget'
            'nc\s+-'
            'ncat\s'
            '/dev/tcp/'
            '/dev/udp/'
            'mkfifo'
            'base64.*-d.*|.*sh'
            'base64.*--decode.*|.*sh'
            'python.*-c.*import.*socket'
            'ruby.*-e.*socket'
            'perl.*-e.*socket'
            'rm\s+-rf\s+/'
            'rm\s+-fr\s+/'
            'mkfs\.'
            'dd\s+if=.*of=/dev/'
            '>\s*/dev/sd'
            'chmod\s+777\s+/'
            'chmod\s+-R\s+777\s+/'
            'chown.*:.*\s+/'
            '\.\./'
            '/etc/passwd'
            '/etc/shadow'
            '/etc/sudoers'
            'GITHUB_TOKEN'
            'ACTIONS_RUNTIME_TOKEN'
            'ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST'
            'AWS_SECRET'
            'AZURE_CREDENTIALS'
            'GCP_SA_KEY'
            'sudo\s'
            'su\s+-'
            'doas\s'
            'pkexec'
            'docker\s+run.*--privileged'
            'docker\s+run.*--pid=host'
            'docker\s+run.*--network=host'
            'docker\s+run.*-v\s+/:/host'
            'nsenter'
            'mount\s'
            'umount\s'
            'crontab'
            '/etc/cron'
            'systemctl\s+start'
            'systemctl\s+enable'
            'service\s+.*\s+start'
            'useradd'
            'usermod'
            'groupadd'
            'visudo'
            'iptables'
            'ufw\s'
            'firewall-cmd'
            'sshd'
            'ssh\s+-R'
            'ssh\s+-L'
            'nohup.*&'
            'screen\s+-dm'
            'tmux\s+new.*-d'
            'at\s+now'
            'batch\s'
          )

          echo "Scanning build script for dangerous patterns..."
          FOUND_DANGEROUS=false
          for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -qPi "$pattern" "$BUILD_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || grep -qi "$pattern" "$BUILD_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "::error::Dangerous pattern detected in build script: $pattern"
              FOUND_DANGEROUS=true
            fi
          done

          if [ "$FOUND_DANGEROUS" = true ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script contains dangerous commands. Please review and remove them."
            exit 1
          fi

          if head -1 "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | grep -q '^#!'; then
            INTERPRETER=$(head -1 "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | sed 's/^#!//' | awk '{print $1}')
            ALLOWED_INTERPRETERS=("/bin/bash" "/bin/sh" "/usr/bin/env bash" "/usr/bin/env sh")
            INTERP_ALLOWED=false
            for allowed in "${ALLOWED_INTERPRETERS[@]}"; do
              if [ "$INTERPRETER" = "$allowed" ]; then
                INTERP_ALLOWED=true
                break
              fi
            done
            if [ "$INTERP_ALLOWED" = false ]; then
              echo "::error::Build script uses disallowed interpreter: $INTERPRETER"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          echo "valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build script validation passed."

      - name: Validate deploy script exists and is safe
        id: validate_deploy
        run: |
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="./scripts/deploy.sh"

          if [ ! -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script not found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi

          FILE_SIZE_KB=$(du -k "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" | cut -f1)
          if [ "$FILE_SIZE_KB" -gt "$MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE_KB" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script exceeds maximum allowed size of ${MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE_KB}KB"
            exit 1
          fi

          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            'curl.*|.*sh'
            'wget.*|.*sh'
            'eval\s'
            '\$\(.*curl'
            '\$\(.*wget'
            'nc\s+-'
            'ncat\s'
            '/dev/tcp/'
            '/dev/udp/'
            'mkfifo'
            'base64.*-d.*|.*sh'
            'base64.*--decode.*|.*sh'
            'python.*-c.*import.*socket'
            'ruby.*-e.*socket'
            'perl.*-e.*socket'
            'rm\s+-rf\s+/'
            'rm\s+-fr\s+/'
            'mkfs\.'
            'dd\s+if=.*of=/dev/'
            '>\s*/dev/sd'
            'chmod\s+777\s+/'
            'chmod\s+-R\s+777\s+/'
            'chown.*:.*\s+/'
            '\.\./'
            '/etc/passwd'
            '/etc/shadow'
            '/etc/sudoers'
            'GITHUB_TOKEN'
            'ACTIONS_RUNTIME_TOKEN'
            'ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST'
            'AWS_SECRET'
            'AZURE_CREDENTIALS'
            'GCP_SA_KEY'
            'sudo\s'
            'su\s+-'
            'doas\s'
            'pkexec'
            'docker\s+run.*--privileged'
            'docker\s+run.*--pid=host'
            'docker\s+run.*--network=host'
            'docker\s+run.*-v\s+/:/host'
            'nsenter'
            'mount\s'
            'umount\s'
            'crontab'
            '/etc/cron'
            'systemctl\s+start'
            'systemctl\s+enable'
            'service\s+.*\s+start'
            'useradd'
            'usermod'
            'groupadd'
            'visudo'
            'iptables'
            'ufw\s'
            'firewall-cmd'
            'sshd'
            'ssh\s+-R'
            'ssh\s+-L'
            'nohup.*&'
            'screen\s+-dm'
            'tmux\s+new.*-d'
            'at\s+now'
            'batch\s'
          )

          echo "Scanning deploy script for dangerous patterns..."
          FOUND_DANGEROUS=false
          for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -qPi "$pattern" "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || grep -qi "$pattern" "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "::error::Dangerous pattern detected in deploy script: $pattern"
              FOUND_DANGEROUS=true
            fi
          done

          if [ "$FOUND_DANGEROUS" = true ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script contains dangerous commands. Please review and remove them."
            exit 1
          fi

          if head -1 "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" | grep -q '^#!'; then
            INTERPRETER=$(head -1 "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" | sed 's/^#!//' | awk '{print $1}')
            ALLOWED_INTERPRETERS=("/bin/bash" "/bin/sh" "/usr/bin/env bash" "/usr/bin/env sh")
            INTERP_ALLOWED=false
            for allowed in "${ALLOWED_INTERPRETERS[@]}"; do
              if [ "$INTERPRETER" = "$allowed" ]; then
                INTERP_ALLOWED=true
                break
              fi
            done
            if [ "$INTERP_ALLOWED" = false ]; then
              echo "::error::Deploy script uses disallowed interpreter: $INTERPRETER"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          echo "valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Deploy script validation passed."

  build:
    name: Build
    needs: validate-scripts
    if: needs.validate-scripts.outputs.build_script_valid == 'true'
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 30
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
    env:
      CI: "true"
      HOME: ${{ github.workspace }}/_home
      TMPDIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/_tmp
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup isolated workspace
        run: |
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/_home"
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/_tmp"
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/build"
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/artifacts"

      - name: Restrict environment and run build script
        env:
          PATH: /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
        run: |
          unset GITHUB_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_RUNTIME_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST_URL
          unset ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_CACHE_URL
          unset ACTIONS_RESULTS_URL

          ulimit -f 1048576 2>/dev/null || true  # 1GB max file size
          ulimit -u 256 2>/dev/null || true       # max 256 processes
          ulimit -v 4194304 2>/dev/null || true   # 4GB max virtual memory
          ulimit -t 1800 2>/dev/null || true      # 30 min CPU time

          echo "::group::Running build script"
          chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh
          bash --restricted ./scripts/build.sh 2>&1
          BUILD_EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "::endgroup::"

          if [ $BUILD_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script failed with exit code $BUILD_EXIT_CODE"
            exit $BUILD_EXIT_CODE
          fi

          echo "Build completed successfully."

      - name: Verify build outputs
        run: |
          if [ -d "${{ github.workspace }}/build" ]; then
            echo "Build output directory contents:"
            find "${{ github.workspace }}/build" -type f | head -50
          fi

          SYMLINKS=$(find "${{ github.workspace }}/build" -type l 2>/dev/null)
          if [ -n "$SYMLINKS" ]; then
            echo "::error::Symlinks detected in build output - removing for safety"
            find "${{ github.workspace }}/build" -type l -delete
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.sha }}
          path: ${{ github.workspace }}/build/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Cleanup workspace
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/_home"
          rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/_tmp"
          echo "Workspace cleaned up."

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs:
      - validate-scripts
      - build
    if: |
      needs.validate-scripts.outputs.deploy_script_valid == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' &&
      github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 20
    environment:
      name: production
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
    env:
      CI: "true"
      HOME: ${{ github.workspace }}/_home
      TMPDIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/_tmp
      DEPLOY_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
      DEPLOY_REF: ${{ github.ref }}
      DEPLOY_ACTOR: ${{ github.actor }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup isolated workspace
        run: |
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/_home"
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/_tmp"
          mkdir -p "${{ github.workspace }}/deploy"

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.sha }}
          path: ${{ github.workspace }}/build/

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "${{ github.workspace }}/build" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build artifacts not found"
            exit 1
          fi

          SYMLINKS=$(find "${{ github.workspace }}/build" -type l 2>/dev/null)
          if [ -n "$SYMLINKS" ]; then
            echo "::error::Symlinks detected in build artifacts - aborting"
            exit 1
          fi

          EXECUTABLES=$(find "${{ github.workspace }}/build" -type f -executable 2>/dev/null)
          if [ -n "$EXECUTABLES" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Executable files found in build artifacts - removing execute permissions"
            find "${{ github.workspace }}/build" -type f -executable -exec chmod -x {} \;
          fi

          echo "Artifact integrity check passed."

      - name: Restrict environment and run deploy script
        env:
          PATH: /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
        run: |
          unset GITHUB_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_RUNTIME_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST_URL
          unset ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_CACHE_URL
          unset ACTIONS_RESULTS_URL

          ulimit -f 1048576 2>/dev/null || true
          ulimit -u 128 2>/dev/null || true
          ulimit -v 2097152 2>/dev/null || true
          ulimit -t 1200 2>/dev/null || true

          echo "::group::Running deploy script"
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
          bash --restricted ./scripts/deploy.sh 2>&1
          DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "::endgroup::"

          if [ $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script failed with exit code $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE"
            exit $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE
          fi

          echo "Deployment completed successfully."

      - name: Cleanup workspace
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/_home"
          rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/_tmp"
          rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/build"
          rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/deploy"
          echo "Workspace cleaned up."

      - name: Log deployment metadata
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Summary ==="
          echo "SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          echo "Status: ${{ job.status }}"
          echo "=========================="
